import io

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut depth = 0
  mut ok = true
  mut i = 0
  while i < string.len(line)
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 40
      depth = depth + 1
    else if b == 41
      if depth == 0
        ok = false
      else
        depth = depth - 1
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  if ok and depth == 0
    print("YES")
  else
    print("NO")
  end
end

import string
